title: Mcfam
compiled_truth: Mcfam is an external contact at [Andrews-kurth](companies/andrews-kurth). Over the corpus period (2000-04-12 to 2000-11-10), Mcfam sent 21 and received 31 emails, totalling 52 interactions. Top correspondents: [Annmarie Tiller](people/annmarie-tiller) (21), [Gareth Bahlmann](people/gareth-bahlmann) (21), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (21), [Barbd](people/barbd-andrews-kurth) (20), [Alan Quaintance](people/alan-quaintance) (20).
